name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve ArchAI
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## 🔁 Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Enter repository URL '...'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## 📸 Screenshots or Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or paste error logs.

```
Error message or stack trace here
```

## 🖥️ Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| OS | e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04 |
| Python version | e.g., 3.11.4 |
| Node.js version | e.g., 20.5.0 |
| Browser | e.g., Chrome 120 |
| ArchAI version / commit | e.g., v1.0.0 or git SHA |

## 📦 Repository URL Analyzed

If the bug is related to analyzing a specific repository:
```
https://github.com/...
```

## 📝 Additional Context

Any other context about the problem here.
